$comment: V0-seed schema — coarse definition sufficient for hand-written registry.json validation. V1 will refine constraints, add pattern rules, and tighten enum values once the generator and CLI stabilize.
title: Mifune Skills Registry
description: Schema for the mifunedev/skills registry.json canonical skill index.

_v0_note.description: Optional human note explaining V0 hand-written status. Present only in pre-generator releases.

$schema.description: Path or URL to this schema.

description.description: Human-readable description of the registry bundle.

version.description: CalVer version of the registry bundle (YYYY.M.D or YYYY.M.D-N).

name.description: Skill name. Matches the folder name. Lowercase + hyphens.

path.description: Relative path from the repo root to the skill folder.

version.description: SemVer version of the individual skill.

checksum.description: sha256: prefixed hash of the skill folder contents. See docs/checksum.md.

description.description: What the skill does and when to invoke it.

requires-tools.description: Binary names the skill expects on PATH.

clients.description: Agent clients this skill has been tested against. Empty means any Agent-Skills-compliant client.

added.description: ISO 8601 date the skill was first added to the registry.

updated.description: ISO 8601 date the skill entry was last updated.

removed.description: If true, skill is tombstoned and will be deleted after one CalVer cycle.
